allowed_claim: Fair baseline and external-transfer claim boundaries
evidence_required: Fair baseline table with Full, Raw Mamba, ResNet1D/CNN, MiniRocket-only, HRV-only plus paired bootstrap CI; external gate summary if external datasets are used
planned_output: Table baselines; Table CI; External gate table
fallback_if_not_supported: Do not claim superiority over all fair baselines or external zero-shot superiority; state ResNet1D/CNN is stronger in-domain and present only comparator-specific metric differences. External datasets require protocol-gate pass before mapped-task reporting.

evidence_required: ECE, MCE, Brier, reliability diagram, sensitivity, specificity, PPV, NPV at threshold 0.5
fallback_if_not_supported: State calibration/fixed-threshold behavior only as metric-specific and comparator-specific; do not claim a general advantage after ResNet1D/CNN is included.

evidence_required: HRV-only result, no-HRV check, HRV domain classifier, duration/noise sensitivity
fallback_if_not_supported: Report HRV-only as a feature baseline and present high HRV domain sensitivity as a limitation

evidence_required: Lead dropout plus UMAP/probing/CKA or similarity analysis
fallback_if_not_supported: Do not claim proven disentanglement; state complementary-stream design and leave representation separation as future work

allowed_claim: Q=3 is a robustness-oriented operating point
evidence_required: Pooling sensitivity mean, Q=2, Q=3, Q=4, Q=8, max on clean and perturbation
fallback_if_not_supported: Present Q=3 as the frozen trade-off operating point, not as globally optimal

evidence_required: Subject-aware split, fixed threshold, no TTA, no threshold tuning on target, explicit label mapping
fallback_if_not_supported: Claim protocol-faithful frozen Chapman OOF evaluation; keep external outputs experimental until dataset-specific protocols are complete
